name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: Chella daughter of Cheyk of the Black Ears had gone ahead to scout, and it was she who brought back word of the army at the crossroads. “By their fires I call them twenty thousand strong,” she said. “Their banners are red, with a golden lion.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella侦察crossroads army，按fires估约两万，red/gold lion banners确认Lannister。
blocks.literary_note_zh: fires只能粗估人数，但banner颜色确认阵营；Chella侦察先让clans成为情报来源。
blocks.background_zh: **Tywin host：** 约两万western army驻crossroads，另一支由Jaime围Riverrun。

blocks.original_text: “Your father?” Bronn asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bronn问是否Tyrion father。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Or my brother Jaime,” Tyrion said. “We shall know soon enough.” He surveyed his ragged band of brigands: near three hundred Stone Crows, Moon Brothers, Black Ears, and Burned Men, and those just the seed of the army he hoped to grow. Gunthor son of Gurn was raising the other clans even now. He wondered what his lord father would make of them in their skins and bits of stolen steel. If truth be told, he did not know what to make of them himself. Was he their commander or their captive? Most of the time, it seemed to be a little of both. “It might be best if I rode down alone,” he suggested.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion说也可能Jaime；他带约三百clansmen，既像commander又像captive，提议独自下山。
blocks.literary_note_zh: commander or captive准确描述Tyrion联盟：他用promises领导，却尚无force强制clans服从。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Best for Tyrion son of Tywin,” said Ulf, who spoke for the Moon Brothers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ulf说这只对Tyrion本人最好。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Shagga glowered, a fearsome sight to see. “Shagga son of Dolf likes this not. Shagga will go with the boyman, and if the boyman lies, Shagga will chop off his manhood—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Shagga不信任，要求同行并以肢体威胁保证Tyrion不撒谎。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “—and feed it to the goats, yes,” Tyrion said wearily. “Shagga, I give you my word as a Lannister, I will return.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion疲惫替他说完惯用威胁，以Lannister word保证回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Why should we trust your word?” Chella was a small hard woman, flat as a boy, and no fool. “Lowland lords have lied to the clans before.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella指出lowland lords曾骗clans，拒绝只凭word。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “You wound me, Chella,” Tyrion said. “Here I thought we had become such friends. But as you will. You shall ride with me, and Shagga and Conn for the Stone Crows, Ulf for the Moon Brothers, and Timett son of Timett for the Burned Men.” The clansmen exchanged wary looks as he named them. “The rest shall wait here until I send for you. Try not to kill and maim each other while I’m gone.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion选各clan代表同行，命其余等待并别互相伤害。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 选每clan一代表既满足voice，也把谈判人数压缩成可行动小组。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: He put his heels to his horse and trotted off, giving them no choice but to follow or be left behind. Either was fine with him, so long as they did not sit down to talk for a day and a night. That was the trouble with the clans; they had an absurd notion that every man’s voice should be heard in council, so they argued about everything, endlessly.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他直接策马，迫代表跟上或留下，避免所有人按平等council无休争论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 策马制造deadline，用movement替代无尽consensus；这是一种procedural power。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Even their women were allowed to speak. Small wonder that it had been hundreds of years since they last threatened the Vale with anything beyond an occasional raid. Tyrion meant to change that.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion讥讽连women都能发言导致clans数百年未成大威胁，并想改变。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion对women speaking的讥讽暴露其把hierarchical efficiency与male authority绑定，文本不必认同。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Brorm rode with him. Behind them—after a quick bit of grumbling—the five clansmen followed on their undersize garrons, scrawny things that looked like ponies and scrambled up rock walls like goats.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bronn同行，五名clan delegates抱怨后骑小garrons跟上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: The Stone Crows rode together, and Chella and Ulf stayed close as well, as the Moon Brothers and Black Ears had strong bonds between them. Timett son of Timett rode alone. Every clan in the Mountains of the Moon feared the Burned Men, who mortified their flesh with fire to prove their courage and (the others said) roasted babies at their feasts. And even the other Burned Men feared Timett, who had put out his own left eye with a white-hot knife when he reached the age of manhood. Tyrion gathered that it was more customary for a boy to burn off a nipple, a finger, or (if he was truly brave, or truly mad) an ear. Timett’s fellow Burned Men were so awed by his choice of an eye that they promptly named him a red hand, which seemed to be some sort of a war chief.
blocks.explanation_zh: Stone Crows、Moon Brothers、Black Ears结盟靠近，Timett独骑；Burned Men以fire自残证明勇气，Timett毁一眼获red hand地位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Burned Men rites将self-harm转为status signal；关于babies是其他clans hearsay，不是已证事实。
blocks.background_zh: **mountain clans：** Stone Crows、Moon Brothers、Black Ears、Burned Men各有独立leaders与customs，不是统一army。

blocks.original_text: “I wonder what their king burned off,” Tyrion said to Bronn when he heard the tale. Grinning, the sellsword had tugged at his crotch . . . but even Bronn kept a respectful tongue around Timett. If a man was mad enough to put out his own eye, he was unlikely to be gentle to his enemies.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion开Timett king玩笑，Bronn以crotch gesture回应，却也不敢当面冒犯。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella发现Lannister army；Tyrion带五clan代表下山，其authority仍介于commander与captive。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Distant watchers peered down from towers of unmortared stone as the party descended through the foothills, and once Tyrion saw a raven take wing. Where the high road twisted between two rocky outcrops, they came to the first strong point. A low earthen wall four feet high closed off the road, and a dozen crossbowmen manned the heights. Tyrion halted his followers out of range and rode to the wall alone. “Who commands here?” he shouted up.
blocks.explanation_zh: descending途中stone towers监视、raven传讯；road strongpoint有earthen wall与crossbows，Tyrion独自上前问command。
blocks.literary_note_zh: watchtowers、raven、crossbow wall构成layered early warning，显示Tywin camp perimeter discipline。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: The captain was quick to appear, and even quicker to give them an escort when he recognized his lord’s son. They trotted past blackened fields and burned holdfasts, down to the riverlands and the Green Fork of the Trident. Tyrion saw no bodies, but the air was full of ravens and carrion crows; there had been fighting here, and recently.
blocks.explanation_zh: captain认出Tywin son后给escort；沿途burned fields、holdfasts与carrion birds证明近期战争。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 无bodies却有carrion birds，是通过environmental trace写近期battle。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Half a league from the crossroads, a barricade of sharpened stakes had been erected, manned by pikemen and archers. Behind the line, the camp spread out to the far distance. Thin fingers of smoke rose from hundreds of cookfires, mailed men sat under trees and honed their blades, and familiar banners fluttered from staffs thrust into the muddy ground.
blocks.explanation_zh: crossroads外stakes防线与远大camp显出大军规模、战备和日常。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: **crossroads position：** 靠Green Fork与主要roads，可拦North southward movement并支援riverlands operations。

blocks.original_text: A party of mounted horsemen rode forward to challenge them as they approached the stakes. The knight who led them wore silver armor inlaid with amethysts and a striped purple-and-silver cloak. His shield bore a unicorn sigil, and a spiral horn two feet long jutted up from the brow of his horsehead helm. Tyrion reined up to greet him. “Ser Flement.”
blocks.explanation_zh: amethyst armor、unicorn sigil的Flement Brax带horsemen挑战来者，Tyrion认出他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Ser Flement Brax lifted his visor. “Tyrion,” he said in astonishment. “My lord, we all feared you dead, or . . . ” He looked at the clansmen uncertainly. “These . . . companions of yours . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Flement惊讶Tyrion未死，又不知如何称呼clansmen。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Bosom friends and loyal retainers,” Tyrion said. “Where will I find my lord father?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion把他们称bosom friends、loyal retainers，问Tywin所在。
blocks.literary_note_zh: bosom friends反讽包装互相挟持的关系，也替clansmen在formal camp中争取retainer legitimacy。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “He has taken the inn at the crossroads for his quarters.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Flement说Tywin住crossroads inn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion laughed. The inn at the crossroads! Perhaps the gods were just after all. “I will see him at once.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion因回到自己曾被捕的inn而笑，觉得像gods justice。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crossroads inn是Tyrion被Catelyn捕获的起点；如今Tywin占用、innkeep被杀构成权力反转。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “As you say, my lord.” Ser Flement wheeled his horse about and shouted commands. Three rows of stakes were pulled from the ground to make a hole in the line. Tyrion led his party through.
blocks.explanation_zh: Flement开stakes通道放行。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin’s camp spread over leagues. Chella’s estimate of twenty thousand men could not be far wrong. The common men camped out in the open, but the knights had thrown up tents, and some of the high lords had erected pavilions as large as houses. Tyrion spied the red ox of the Presters, Lord Crakehall’s brindled boar, the burning tree of Marbrand, the badger of Lydden. Knights called out to him as he cantered past, and men-at-arms gaped at the clansmen in open astonishment.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin camp覆盖数league，约两万；Tyrion认出western banners，军士惊看clansmen。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Shagga was gaping back; beyond a certainty, he had never seen so many men, horses, and weapons in all his days. The rest of the mountain brigands did a better job of guarding their faces, but Tyrion had no doubts that they were full as much in awe. Better and better. The more impressed they were with the power of the Lannisters, the easier they would be to command.
blocks.explanation_zh: Shagga等被men、horses、weapons震撼，Tyrion判断Lannister power spectacle会使其更易command。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 让clans看Lannister规模是deliberate awe politics；Tyrion把spectacle转成future obedience。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: The inn and its stables were much as he remembered, though little more than tumbled stones and blackened foundations remained where the rest of the village had stood. A gibbet had been erected in the yard, and the body that swung there was covered with ravens. At Tyrion’s approach they took to the air, squawking and flapping their black wings. He dismounted and glanced up at what remained of the corpse. The birds had eaten her lips and eyes and most of her cheeks, baring her stained red teeth in a hideous smile. “A room, a meal, and a flagon of wine, that was all I asked,” he reminded her with a sigh of reproach.
blocks.explanation_zh: village已成black ruins，inn yard吊着拒绝Tyrion服务的innkeep corpse；Tyrion以旧请求讽刺。
blocks.literary_note_zh: corpse smile与Tyrion reproach把报复写成黑色幽默，无法抹去innkeep死亡的极端不对称。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Boys emerged hesitantly from the stables to see to their horses. Shagga did not want to give his up. “The lad won’t steal your mare,” Tyrion assured him. “He only wants to give her some oats and water and brush out her coat.” Shagga’s coat could have used a good brushing too, but it would have been less than tactful to mention it. “You have my word, the horse will not be harmed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: stableboys接马，Shagga怕mare被偷，Tyrion解释只是喂养梳理并以word保证。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Glaring, Shagga let go his grip on the reins. “This is the horse of Shagga son of Dolf,” he roared at the stableboy.
blocks.explanation_zh: Shagga向boy宣告horse所有权。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “If he doesn’t give her back, chop off his manhood and feed it to the goats,” Tyrion promised. “Provided you can find some.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion用Shagga惯用威胁保证归还，附带需找到goats的玩笑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: A pair of house guards in crimson cloaks and lion-crested helms stood under the inn’s sign, on either side of the door. Tyrion recognized their captain. “My father?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 门口house guards中Tyrion认出captain，问Tywin。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “In the common room, m’lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: captain说在common room。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “My men will want meat and mead,” Tyrion told him. “See that they get it.” He entered the inn, and there was Father.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion命给自己men肉酒，进入见父亲。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他们穿过Tywin layered defenses与两万camp，在crossroads inn见到被战争摧毁的village和Tywin guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Tywin Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock and Warden of the West, was in his middle fifties, yet hard as a man of twenty. Even seated, he was tall, with long legs, broad shoulders, a flat stomach. His thin arms were corded with muscle. When his once-thick golden hair had begun to recede, he had commanded his barber to shave his head; Lord Tywin did not believe in half measures. He razored his lip and chin as well, but kept his side-whiskers, two great thickets of wiry golden hair that covered most of his cheeks from ear to jaw. His eyes were a pale green, flecked with gold. A fool more foolish than most had once jested that even Lord Tywin’s shit was flecked with gold. Some said the man was still alive, deep in the bowels of Casterly Rock.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin五十多仍强健，剃光退发与面部，只留巨大gold side-whiskers，体现拒绝half measures。
blocks.literary_note_zh: shaved head来自控制不可逆aging appearance；no half measures把身体管理与Tywin政治风格统一。
blocks.background_zh: **Tywin titles：** Casterly Rock lord、Warden of West，Lannister military/political head。

blocks.original_text: Ser Kevan Lannister, his father’s only surviving brother, was sharing a flagon of ale with Lord Tywin when Tyrion entered the common room. His uncle was portly and balding, with a close-cropped yellow beard that followed the line of his massive jaw. Ser Kevan saw him first. “Tyrion,” he said in surprise.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan与Tywin饮ale，先惊见Tyrion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Uncle,” Tyrion said, bowing. “And my lord father. What a pleasure to find you here.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion礼貌向uncle、father问候。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin did not stir from his chair, but he did give his dwarf son a long, searching look. “I see that the rumors of your demise were unfounded.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin只长久审视，说死亡rumors不实。
blocks.literary_note_zh: unfounded rumors是Tywin的最低限度欢迎，情感克制让Tyrion立刻以sarcasm防卫。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Sorry to disappoint you, Father,” Tyrion said. “No need to leap up and embrace me, I wouldn’t want you to strain yourself.” He crossed the room to their table, acutely conscious of the way his stunted legs made him waddle with every step. Whenever his father’s eyes were on him, he became uncomfortably aware of all his deformities and shortcomings. “Kind of you to go to war for me,” he said as he climbed into a chair and helped himself to a cup of his father’s ale.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion以sarcasm回应无拥抱，并在父亲目光下更意识身体差异，讽谢其为自己开战。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父亲gaze触发Tyrion身体羞耻；他先说war gratitude，实质试探自己在House价值。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “By my lights, it was you who started this,” Lord Tywin replied. “Your brother Jaime would never have meekly submitted to capture at the hands of a woman.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说Tyrion引发局势，Jaime不会温顺被woman抓。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “That’s one way we differ, Jaime and I. He’s taller as well, you may have noticed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion说这只是兄弟差异之一，Jaime也更高。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: His father ignored the sally. “The honor of our House was at stake. I had no choice but to ride. No man sheds Lannister blood with impunity.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin无视笑话，说House honor迫他出兵，Lannister blood不可无代价流。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin明确说战争为House honor，不说为son love；public reputation替代private affection。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Hear Me Roar,” Tyrion said, grinning. The Lannister words. “Truth be told, none of my blood was actually shed, although it was a close thing once or twice. Morrec and Jyck were killed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion引用Hear Me Roar，指出自己没流血但Morrec、Jyck死了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “I suppose you will be wanting some new men.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin推测他需要new men。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Don’t trouble yourself, Father, I’ve acquired a few of my own.” He tried a swallow of the ale. It was brown and yeasty, so thick you could almost chew it. Very fine, in truth. A pity his father had hanged the innkeep. “How is your war going?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion说已自行获得，品ale并惋惜innkeep被吊，问war进展。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: His uncle answered. “Well enough, for the nonce. Ser Edmure had scattered small troops of men along his borders to stop our raiding, and your lord father and I were able to destroy most of them piecemeal before they could regroup.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan说Edmure分散border troops，被Tywin逐个击破。
blocks.literary_note_zh: piecemeal说明Tywin利用Edmure兵力分散逐个消灭，是operational advantage而非单纯勇猛。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Your brother has been covering himself with glory,” his father said. “He smashed the Lords Vance and Piper at the Golden Tooth, and met the massed power of the Tullys under the walls of Riverrun. The lords of the Trident have been put to rout. Ser Edmure Tully was taken captive, with many of his knights and bannermen. Lord Blackwood led a few survivors back to Riverrun, where Jaime has them under siege. The rest fled to their own strongholds.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说Jaime败Vance、Piper，击溃Trident host、俘Edmure并围Riverrun。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: **riverlands state：** Edmure被俘、Riverrun受Jaime siege，多处castles和small forces被Tywin逐破。

blocks.original_text: “Your father and I have been marching on each in turn,” Ser Kevan said. “With Lord Blackwood gone, Raventree fell at once, and Lady Whent yielded Harrenhal for want of men to defend it. Ser Gregor burnt out the Pipers and the Brackens . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan说Tywin逐一攻castle，Raventree、Harrenhal失守，Gregor焚Piper/Bracken lands。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Leaving you unopposed?” Tyrion said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion问是否已无对手。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Not wholly,” Ser Kevan said. “The Mallisters still hold Seagard and Walder Frey is marshaling his levies at the Twins.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan说Mallister守Seagard，Frey在Twins muster。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “No matter,” Lord Tywin said. “Frey only takes the field when the scent of victory is in the air, and all he smells now is ruin. And Jason Mallister lacks the strength to fight alone. Once Jaime takes Riverrun, they will both be quick enough to bend the knee. Unless the Starks and the Arryns come forth to oppose us, this war is good as won.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin认为Frey只嗅victory才出战、Mallister孤弱；若Stark/Arryn不来，war近胜。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin对Frey的判断与Catelyn不信任相合：formal bannerman会等待胜负气味。
blocks.background_zh: **Walder Frey：** 在Twins muster但尚未选side；Tywin预期其只在胜势明确时参战。

blocks.original_text: “I would not fret overmuch about the Arryns if I were you,” Tyrion said. “The Starks are another matter. Lord Eddard—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion说Vale不必担心，但Starks尤其Eddard另当别论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “—is our hostage,” his father said. “He will lead no armies while he rots in a dungeon under the Red Keep.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin打断说Eddard是hostage，无法领军。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Ser Kevan agreed, “but his son has called the banners and sits at Moat Cailin with a strong host around him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan补充Robb已召banners在Moat Cailin集强军。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “No sword is strong until it’s been tempered,” Lord Tywin declared. “The Stark boy is a child. No doubt he likes the sound of warhorns well enough, and the sight of his banners fluttering in the wind, but in the end it comes down to butcher’s work. I doubt he has the stomach for it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin以untempered sword比Robb child，认为他爱war spectacle却未必承受butcher’s work。
blocks.literary_note_zh: untempered sword既贬Robb年轻，也承认combat会改变其strength；Tywin低估与观察并存。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Things had gotten interesting while he’d been away, Tyrion reflected. “And what is our fearless monarch doing whilst all this ‘butcher’s work’ is being done?” he wondered. “How has my lovely and persuasive sister gotten Robert to agree to the imprisonment of his dear friend Ned?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion问Robert为何容许囚Ned，暗讽Cersei persuasion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Robert Baratheon is dead,” his father told him. “Your nephew reigns in King’s Landing.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin告知Robert死、Joffrey即位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 父子冷淡重逢；Tywin说明riverlands胜势、Eddard hostage与Robb muster，并告知Robert死、Cersei实际掌权。
blocks.background_zh: **succession news：** Robert已死，Joffrey即位；Tyrion立刻判断Cersei为effective ruler。

blocks.original_text: That did take Tyrion aback. “My sister, you mean.” He took another gulp of ale. The realm would be a much different place with Cersei ruling in place of her husband.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion真正吃惊，判断实际是Cersei统治，realm将改变。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion说my sister不是my nephew，直接识别minor king背后的effective ruler。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “If you have a mind to make yourself of use, I will give you a command,” his father said. “Marq Piper and Karyl Vance are loose in our rear, raiding our lands across the Red Fork.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin给他command去处理rear的Piper、Vance raids。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion made a tsking sound. “The gall of them, fighting back. Ordinarily I’d be glad to punish such rudeness, Father, but the truth is, I have pressing business elsewhere.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion讽刺敌人竟敢反击，称自己另有urgent business。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Do you?” Lord Tywin did not seem awed. “We also have a pair of Ned Stark’s afterthoughts making a nuisance of themselves by harassing my foraging parties. Beric Dondarrion, some young lordling with delusions of valor. He has that fat jape of a priest with him, the one who likes to set his sword on fire. Do you think you might be able to deal with them as you scamper off? Without making too much a botch of it?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin又提Beric、Thoros袭foragers，轻蔑问Tyrion能否顺便处理且别搞砸。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin以scamper、botch预设Tyrion不可靠，command offer同时是利用与羞辱。
blocks.background_zh: **Beric/Thoros：** Eddard此前奉Robert banner派出的force，现以survivors袭击Lannister foragers。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion wiped his mouth with the back of his hand and smiled. “Father, it warms my heart to think that you might entrust me with . . . what, twenty men? Fifty? Are you sure you can spare so many? Well, no matter. If I should come across Thoros and Lord Beric, I shall spank them both.” He climbed down from his chair and waddled to the sideboard, where a wheel of veined white cheese sat surrounded by fruit. “First, though, I have some promises of my own to keep,” he said as he sliced off a wedge. “I shall require three thousand helms and as many hauberks, plus swords, pikes, steel spearheads, maces, battleaxes, gauntlets, gorgets, greaves, breastplates, wagons to carry all this—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion讽刺父亲可能只给二三十men，承诺遇见便教训；随后提出履约所需三千套arms、armor与wagons。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三千套要求揭示Tyrion promises规模；他把clan alliance从私人担保转嫁给Lannister logistics。
blocks.background_zh: **Tyrion promise：** 他曾许clans weapons、armor、horses与Vale lands，三千套是把约三百seed扩大为army的准备。

blocks.original_text: The door behind him opened with a crash, so violently that Tyrion almost dropped his cheese. Ser Kevan leapt up swearing as the captain of the guard went flying across the room to smash against the hearth. As he tumbled down into the cold ashes, his lion helm askew, Shagga snapped the man’s sword in two over a knee thick as a tree trunk, threw down the pieces, and lumbered into the common room. He was preceded by his stench, riper than the cheese and overpowering in the closed space. “Little redcape,” he snarled, “when next you bare steel on Shagga son of Dolf, I will chop off your manhood and roast it in the fire.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 门被撞开，Shagga掷guard、折剑并以惯用威胁斥其拔steel，气味充满room。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Shagga闯门用身体violence迫camp承认代表资格；Tywin的reaction将决定关系是镇压还是吸纳。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “What, no goats?” Tyrion said, taking a bite of cheese.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion冷静问为何这次没有goats。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: The other clansmen followed Shagga into the common room, Bronn with them. The sellsword gave Tyrion a rueful shrug.
blocks.explanation_zh: 其余clansmen与无奈Bronn跟进。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Who might you be?” Lord Tywin asked, cool as snow.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin冷静问来者身份。
blocks.literary_note_zh: cool as snow显示Tywin不接受对方设定的fear frame，先以身份问题夺回interaction control。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “They followed me home, Father,” Tyrion explained. “May I keep them? They don’t eat much.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion玩笑说他们跟回家，可否留下且吃得少。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: No one was smiling. “By what right do you savages intrude on our councils?” demanded Ser Kevan.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan怒问savages凭何闯war council。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Savages, lowlander?” Conn might have been handsome if you washed him. “We are free men, and free men by rights sit on all war councils.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Conn说他们是free men，按权利能参加所有war councils。
blocks.literary_note_zh: free men sit councils解释clan political norm；与Tywin/ Kevan垂直authority冲突。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Which one is the lion lord?” Chella asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella问谁是lion lord。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “They are both old men,” announced Timett son of Timett, who had yet to see his twentieth year.
blocks.explanation_zh: 未满二十Timett说两个都是old men。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Ser Kevan’s hand went to his sword hilt, but his brother placed two fingers on his wrist and held him fast. Lord Tywin seemed unperturbed. “Tyrion, have you forgotten your courtesies? Kindly acquaint us with our . . . honored guests.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan摸sword，Tywin两指阻止并要求Tyrion正式介绍honored guests。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin两指止Kevan拔剑避免让武器升级，再以courtesy把intrusion改写为formal audience。
blocks.background_zh: **council norm conflict：** clans认为free adults有发言权；western feudal council按rank和invitation进入。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion licked his fingers. “With pleasure,” he said. “The fair maid is Chella daughter of Cheyk of the Black Ears.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion称Chella为fair maid。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “I’m no maid,” Chella protested. “My sons have taken fifty ears among them.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella纠正自己已有sons且取五十ears。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “May they take fifty more.” Tyrion waddled away from her. “This is Conn son of Coratt. Shagga son of Dolf is the one who looks like Casterly Rock with hair. They are Stone Crows. Here is Ulf son of Umar of the Moon Brothers, and here Timett son of Timett, a red hand of the Burned Men. And this is Bronn, a sellsword of no particular allegiance. He has already changed sides twice in the short time I’ve known him, you and he ought to get on famously, Father.” To Bronn and the clansmen he said, “May I present my lord father, Tywin son of Tytos of House Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock, Warden of the West, Shield of Lannisport, and once and future Hand of the King.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion祝再取五十，逐一介绍clans与Bronn，还讽Bronn多次换side应与Tywin投契，再正式列Tywin titles。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion introductions同时准确、侮辱、逗笑且传递titles；他充当两个政治文化的translator。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin rose, dignified and correct. “Even in the west, we know the prowess of the warrior clans of the Mountains of the Moon. What brings you down from your strongholds, my lords?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin起身用尊重礼仪称赞mountain warriors，问为何下山。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin称my lords与prowess是strategic respect，不表示真把其社会地位等同western lords。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Horses,” said Shagga.
blocks.explanation_zh: Shagga答为horses。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “A promise of silk and steel,” said Timett son of Timett.
blocks.explanation_zh: Timett答为silk与steel promise。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin给Tyrion次要清剿任务；Tyrion索要三千装备履约，clansmen闯council并被正式引见。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion was about to tell his lord father how he proposed to reduce the Vale of Arryn to a smoking wasteland, but he was never given the chance. The door banged open again. The messenger gave Tyrion’s clansmen a quick, queer look as he dropped to one knee before Lord Tywin. “My lord,” he said, “Ser Addam bid me tell you that the Stark host is moving down the causeway.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion正欲说明攻Vale计划，messenger来报Stark host正沿causeway南下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark movement打断Tyrion讲Vale plan，让long-term promise立即被current war征用。
blocks.background_zh: **Robb movement：** North host离开Moat Cailin southward，正进入Tywin可诱战范围。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin Lannister did not smile. Lord Tywin never smiled, but Tyrion had learned to read his father’s pleasure all the same, and it was there on his face. “So the wolfling is leaving his den to play among the lions,” he said in a voice of quiet satisfaction. “Splendid. Return to Ser Addam and tell him to fall back. He is not to engage the northerners until we arrive, but I want him to harass their flanks and draw them farther south.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin露出Tyrion能读懂的满意，命Addam退而不战、骚扰flanks诱敌更南。
blocks.literary_note_zh: fall back不是撤败，而是诱敌脱离Moat安全、拉长其formation与supply。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “It will be as you command.” The rider took his leave.
blocks.explanation_zh: messenger领命。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “We are well situated here,” Ser Kevan pointed out. “Close to the ford and ringed by pits and spikes. If they are coming south, I say let them come, and break themselves against us.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan主张依托ford、pits、spikes防御，让Starks撞上来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Kevan倾向prepared defense，Tywin则担心enemy不commit；争议是terrain advantage与decisive battle timing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “The boy may hang back or lose his courage when he sees our numbers,” Lord Tywin replied. “The sooner the Starks are broken, the sooner I shall be free to deal with Stannis Baratheon. Tell the drummers to beat assembly, and send word to Jaime that I am marching against Robb Stark.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin担心Robb见人数便退，急于先破Stark再处理Stannis，命集结并通知Jaime。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin需腾手对Stannis，说明他把Robb当必须快速解决的次级但紧迫front。
blocks.background_zh: **Stannis front：** Tywin预计Robert brothers也会争位，因此希望先击破Robb释放主力。

blocks.original_text: “As you will,” Ser Kevan said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan服从。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion watched with a grim fascination as his lord father turned next to the half-wild clansmen. “It is said that the men of the mountain clans are warriors without fear.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion grimly观察父亲转向clansmen，先称传闻他们无fear。
blocks.literary_note_zh: warriors without fear是精心bait：直接触碰clans honor identity。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “It is said truly,” Conn of the Stone Crows answered.
blocks.explanation_zh: Conn确认传闻为真。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “And the women,” Chella added.
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella补充women也无fear。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Ride with me against my enemies, and you shall have all my son promised you, and more,” Lord Tywin told them.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin许其参战即可得Tyrion承诺及更多。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Would you pay us with our own coin?” Ulf son of Umar said. “Why should we need the father’s promise, when we have the son’s?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Ulf说已有son promise，不需father用自己的coin再付。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ulf识破double promise，显示clans非被廉价奉承完全操控。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “I said nothing of need,” Lord Tywin replied. “My words were courtesy, nothing more. You need not join us. The men of the winterlands are made of iron and ice, and even my boldest knights fear to face them.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说只是courtesy，不必参战，并反称winter men铁冰所成、连bold knights都怕。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin用choice表面撤回压力，再说连knights都怕，令拒战等同承认比lowlanders胆小。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: Oh, deftly done, Tyrion thought, smiling crookedly.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion看出激将非常deft。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion明确欣赏技术，说明父子共享对pride manipulation的理解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “The Burned Men fear nothing. Timett son of Timett will ride with the lions.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Timett立即说Burned Men无惧，愿随lions。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Wherever the Burned Men go, the Stone Crows have been there first,” Conn declared hotly. “We ride as well.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Conn不甘Stone Crows落后，也加入。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Shagga son of Dolf will chop off their manhoods and feed them to the crows.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Shagga以惯用威胁宣战。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “We will ride with you, lion lord,” Chella daughter of Cheyk agreed, “but only if your halfman son goes with us. He has bought his breath with promises. Until we hold the steel he has pledged us, his life is ours.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chella代表Black Ears同意，但要求halfman同行；在拿到steel前Tyrion life属clans。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chella把Tyrion presence设为履约担保；他既是ally commander也是collateral。
blocks.background_zh: **living surety：** clans在steel交付前以Tyrion本人作担保，防止Tywin只用口头promise消耗他们。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin turned his gold-flecked eyes on his son.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin把gold-flecked eyes转向son。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stark host南下，Tywin决定主动迎战并用honor bait招募clans；Chella要求Tyrion亲自同行作promise担保。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。

blocks.original_text: “Joy,” Tyrion said with a resigned smile.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion以resigned smile说Joy，接受自己被放进战局。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joy把无权拒绝包装成witty assent，维持Tyrion在父亲与clans前的face。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tyrion双重authority、Tywin war assessment与clan honor manipulation。
